title: 2026 ICE Shooting of Alex Pretti
about:
The 2026 ICE Shooting of Alex Pretti refers to the fatal shooting of 37-year-old intensive care nurse Alex Pretti by an Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agent in Minneapolis, Minnesota. The shooting happened on January 24th, 2026, roughly two weeks after the fatal shooting of Renee Good by an ICE agent in the same city. According to the Department of Homeland Security (DHS), Pretti was armed and resisted disarming attempts by ICE, resulting in the agent shooting him in self-defence. This claim has been challenged by some, including Pretti's family members and eyewitnesses at the scene of the incident. Pretti notably worked at the Minneapolis Veterans Affairs hospital.

Pretti's death inspired further criticism and outrage towards ICE and the Trump administration, especially because of how close the incident was to Renee Good's death. Some referred to the incident as a "public execution" as it sparked further police brutality debates. In contrast, others defended ICE and mocked his death, including through a series of memes combining the names "Pretti" and "Good" to make the phrase "Pretti Good."

Days after the shooting, Republicans reportedly called for a more thorough investigation of the incident. U.S. President Donald Trump sent "border czar" Tom Homan to Minnesota to oversee ICE amid concerns over the incident. The federal government notably withheld the name of Pretti's shooter following the incident.
